# Autopay Policy — Retail Banking

## Overview

This document describes the autopay enrollment policy for retail banking customers.
All cust acct holders may enroll in autopay for their monthly stmnt balance.

## Eligibility

- Active acct in good standing for at least 90 days
- Verified email address on file
- No pending chrgbck disputes on the acct

## Enrollment Process

1. Customer logs in and navigates to the pymnt settings page.
2. Select autopay and confirm the desired bal threshold.
3. A confirmation is sent to the cust email.
4. The first autopay txn occurs on the next billing cycle.

## Cancellation

To cancel autopay, the cust must submit a written request at least 5 business days
before the next scheduled pymnt. Refunds for duplicate pymnts are processed within
10 business days.

## Limits

- Maximum autopay lmt: $10,000 per txn
- Minimum autopay amount: full minimum pymnt due
- Avail balance must cover the full autopay amount at the time of processing
